name: Ethereal Chains
subtitle: 3rd-level Evocation (Binding)
description: Summoning ethereal chains from the arcane realms, you bind a single target within 30 feet. The target must succeed on a Strength saving throw or be restrained for the spell's duration. While restrained, the target suffers a -2 penalty to AC and Dexterity saving throws, and their movement speed is reduced to 0. Each round, the target can make another Strength saving throw, ending the effect on a success. The ethereal chains are visible only to the caster, shimmering with arcane energy.
lore: Crafted by elven warlocks as a means of subduing foes without bloodshed, Ethereal Chains is a spell born from the need for control in chaotic battles. Its creation marked a shift in arcane tactics, focusing on hindrance and strategy over brute force.
